hooks.command: powershell -Command "$file = $env:TOOL_OUTPUT; if ($file -match 'schemas[\\/]') { Write-Host '⚠ SCHEMA MODIFIED — Required actions: (1) bump schema_version, (2) update ClosedThesis/Thesis Pydantic models, (3) check data/ JSON files for migration, (4) add changelog note to docs/SPEC_v1.1.md' } elseif ($file -match 'sector_taxonomy') { Write-Host '⚠ TAXONOMY MODIFIED — Required actions: (1) check etf_universe.yaml has ETF coverage for new sectors, (2) grep data/theses/ for references to removed sectors, (3) check scoring_weights.yaml if demand_driver weights needed' } elseif ($file -match 'structural_catalysts[\\/]') { Write-Host '⚠ STRUCTURAL CATALYST MODIFIED — Required actions: (1) update intensity.history if current_score changed, (2) update status_last_reviewed, (3) check linked_event_catalyst_ids is current' }"

powershell -Command "$file = $env:TOOL_INPUT; if ($file -match 'schemas[\\/]|sector_taxonomy|catalyst_taxonomy|scoring_weights|structural_catalysts[\\/]') { Write-Host '📋 CONFIG/SCHEMA FILE — Read CLAUDE.md §Schema Change Protocol before editing' }"
